description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat, slightly multi-level roof and a clean, rectangular footprint. The front yard features a driveway with a parked orange car, a small garden, and a tree, all enclosed by a low white fence. The house has large windows, a visible front porch, and a mix of white and light green exterior walls. The backyard includes a swing set and additional landscaping, while the side yard has a pergola and more greenery. The roofline is simple, with some skylights and a rooftop terrace area. The overall design is open and airy, with a focus on outdoor living spaces and natural light.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a front porch, and landscaped front and back yards, enclosed by a white fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with orange car, front porch, and garden with a tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, pergola, and side yard landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backyard, swing set, and back facade with windows and doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the tree, side windows, and the full length of the house and yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
